title: exallage chrysotricha
intro: Exallage chrysotricha, also known as the "golden velvet plant," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Exallage chrysotricha include its ability to treat various ailments, such as wounds, fever, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
